summary: TWO_COLUMN Stone-Weierstrass: polynomials dense in C([0, 1]). LEFT axes with BLUE f(x)=|sin(πx)| + YELLOW Chebyshev polynomial P_n via always_redraw. Coefficients precomputed via C.chebfit on 60 Chebyshev nodes. ValueTracker n_idx_tr steps degrees {1, 3, 5, 7, 9, 15}. RIGHT panel has live sup-error → 0.
